title: Notion Habit Tracker — Build Habits That Actually Stick
description:
Stop abandoning your habits after two weeks. This all-in-one Notion Habit Tracker gives you a beautifully structured system to define, log, analyze, and celebrate your daily habits — all in one place you already own.

Built for everyone from beginners to power users, this template includes four interconnected databases: a Habit Library to define your habits with categories, cues, and difficulty ratings; a Daily Log to check off habits and capture mood and quality data; a Weekly Review system to reflect and course-correct; and a Goals & Milestones tracker to keep you motivated with long-term targets.

The visual dashboard shows you today's habits, streak leaders, this week at a glance, and your latest weekly review — the moment you open Notion. No more wondering how you're doing. No more lost streaks you didn't know you were building.

Whether you want to build a morning routine, exercise consistently, or finally track the habits that matter across health, work, mindset, and relationships — this template gives you the clarity, structure, and insight to make it happen.
features: 4-database system (Habit Library, Daily Log, Weekly Reviews, Goals & Milestones) that connects your daily check-ins to long-term progress in one unified workspace.
Visual dashboard homepage showing today's habits, active streaks, weekly progress, and your latest review — so you always know exactly where you stand.
Category-based habit organization across Health, Mindset, Work, Relationships, Finance, and Creative domains to keep your habit stack balanced and intentional.
Mood tracking (before & after), quality ratings, and skip-reason logging in the Daily Log so you can identify patterns and understand what's really driving your results.
Built-in Goals & Milestones database with progress formulas and reward fields to give you motivating checkpoints beyond just daily streaks.

faq.q: Do I need to be an advanced Notion user to use this template?
faq.a: Not at all. The template is designed to work out of the box for beginners — just duplicate it to your Notion workspace, open the Habit Library, and add your first habit in under 10 minutes. Advanced users will appreciate the flexible database structure, formula fields, and fully customizable views.

faq.q: How do I get the template after purchase?
faq.a: After completing your purchase on Gumroad, you will receive a link to a Notion page. Click 'Duplicate' in the top-right corner to add the full template to your own Notion workspace. You only need a free Notion account to use it.

faq.q: Can I track both daily habits and habits I only do a few times per week?
faq.a: Yes. Each habit in the Habit Library has a Target Frequency field with options including Daily, 5×/week, 3×/week, and Weekly. You can filter and customize your Daily Log views to match exactly how often each habit is scheduled, keeping your tracker realistic and flexible.
